summary: A checklist report describes 1st Lt Joseph C. McHenry at Muroc Air Field, California, on 8 July 1947 sighting two silver disc-like or spherical objects moving at about 300 MPH at roughly 8,000 feet, heading north; other witnesses including S/Sgt Gerald E. Nauman, T/Sgt Joseph Ruvolo, and Miss Jannette Marie Scotte confirmed the sighting, and a third similar object was later reportedly seen performing a tight circle over the airfield.
